subcodes.first_line: O thou who guidest others on the path of guidance! The messenger of divine favor is the greatest of gifts and the fruit of the tree of mercy. How numerous indeed are the souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای هادی سبیل هدایت پیک عنایت است و اعظم موهبت و ثمره شجره رحمت چه بسیار نفوس
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @thankfulness; gratitude
